title: Living Nature Soft Toy Gift Bundle - Plush Husky Dog (20cm) & Puppy (16cm), Grey & White
features: REALISTIC – Premium soft toys that look as realistic as possible and still give great hugs
FOR ALL AGES – Plush toys suitable for animal lovers and wildlife enthusiasts of any age
FACT TAGS – Learn about your animal’s behaviour, habitat and diet from the swing tag
BUNDLE PACK – Perfect present idea, bundle includes Mother (20cm) and Baby (16cm)
COLLECT THEM ALL – Over 120 different Living Nature animals to collect and learn about
description: From the manufacturer Husky Bundle (Mother & Puppy) Living Nature Living Nature make premium soft toys, offering a high-quality product with incredible detail. Embracing the Wonder of Nature This exclusive brand of beautifully crafted and realistically detailed soft toy animals has brought many children to love and understand the amazing facts about wildlife. Designed to delight and educate children and adults alike, we pay particular attention to detail to ensure these soft toys look as realistic as possible. Premium Quality Hugs This range of plush toys animals are for those who would like a pet or just love cuddly toys. Realistic Detail Beautifully crafted and realistically detailed soft toy animals that make perfect presents. Over 120 Animals to Collect Plush toys suitable for animal lovers and wildlife enthusiasts of any age. Fact Tags Learn about your animal's behaviour, habitat and diet from the swing tag.
